raw_consumer_statement:
During my recent trip to XXXX, in the month of XXXX, my credit card information was stolen. That same day, I discovered an unauthorized charge in the amount of {$490.00} from an unknown merchant appearing on my account statement. This charge is entirely fraudulent. I did not authorize the transaction, I did not provide my account number to the merchant, and I did not receive any goods or services in connection with this charge. 
Despite submitting two separate disputes regarding this fraudulent transaction, Citibank has denied my request for cancellation, asserting that I accepted responsibility for the disputed charge when I provided my account number for the transaction. This assertion is categorically false! I reiterate that I never provided my account number, never authorized the charge, and never received any merchandise or services. The charge is wholly unauthorized and fraudulent. 
Accordingly, I hereby demand that Citibank immediately reverse the charge and issue a full refund of {$490.00} ( plus international transaction fee ) tomyaccount.
